ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the activity data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity data */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Total calories burned by the user */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken by the user */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the user */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors climbed by the user */,
  "minutes_sedentary" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a sedentary state */,
  "minutes_lightly_active" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a lightly active state */,
  "minutes_fairly_active" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a fairly active state */,
  "minutes_very_active" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a very active state */,
  "activity_calories" INTEGER /* Calories burned during active periods */,
  "heart_rate" REAL /* Average heart rate of the user during the activity */,
  "blood_pressure" REAL /* Blood pressure of the user during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_data" (
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the sleep data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep data */,
  "minutes_of_sleep" INTEGER /* Total minutes of sleep */,
  "minutes_of_being_awake" INTEGER /* Total minutes spent being awake during sleep */,
  "number_of_awakings" INTEGER /* Number of times the user woke up during sleep */,
  "length_of_rest_in_minutes" INTEGER /* Total length of rest in minutes */,
  "sleep_quality" REAL /* Quality of sleep (e.g., 1-5, where 1 is poor and 5 is excellent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of the goal (e.g., steps, calories, sleep) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the goal is completed */,
  "reminder_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reminders for the goal (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preferences belong to */,
  "receive_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user wants to receive notifications */,
  "share_data_with_researchers" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user agrees to share data with researchers */,
  "share_data_with_third_parties" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user agrees to share data with third parties */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preferred by the user (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user (e.g., UTC-5, UTC+1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the device belongs to */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., watch, phone) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_version" TEXT /* Version of the device software */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last synchronized with the platform */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device (e.g., 0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the session belongs to */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged out */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES user_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the feedback belongs to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the reminder belongs to */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder is set for */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time the reminder is set for */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Message to be displayed with the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., running, swimming, cycling) */,
  "calories_burned_per_hour" REAL /* Average calories burned per hour for the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_stages" (
  "sleep_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep stage */,
  "sleep_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the sleep stage (e.g., light, deep, REM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sleep stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_stage_id")
)
